meta.title: Streak — Build habits that actually stick
meta.description: Streak is the warm, friendly habit tracker that turns small daily wins into lasting routines. Track habits, protect your streaks, and challenge friends.

hero.subhead: Streak turns the messy work of changing your life into small, daily wins. Check in once a day, keep the chain alive, and watch tiny routines compound into who you want to become.
hero.socialProof: Loved by 40,000+ people building better mornings, workouts, and reading habits.

features.heading: The tools that turn intentions into routines.
features.subhead: Everything you need to keep showing up — and nothing you don't.

dailyCheckIns.title: Daily check-ins
dailyCheckIns.description: One tap is all it takes to log a habit. No journaling, no novellas — just the quick, satisfying click that keeps your day on track.

streakFreezes.title: Streak freezes
streakFreezes.description: Life happens. Earn freezes by staying consistent, then spend them to protect your chain on the days that try to knock you off course.

friendChallenges.title: Friend challenges
friendChallenges.description: Invite a friend, pick a habit, and race side by side. Shared accountability turns solo willpower into a game you'll actually show up for.

pricing.heading: Simple pricing. Serious results.
pricing.subhead: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to go all in.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: For trying out the habit you've been putting off.

pro.name: Pro
pro.tagline: For the long haul — and the life you're actually building.
features: Streak freezes to protect bad days

footer.tagline: Small habits, big change. One day at a time.
footer.madeFor: Made for people who show up.

login.prompt: Enter your email and we'll send you a magic link. No password needed.
login.terms: By continuing you agree to our Terms and Privacy.
login.linkSentTo: We sent a magic link to {email}. Tap the link and you're in.
login.linkSentNoEmail: We sent a magic link. Tap the link and you're in.

today.heading: Don't break the chain.
today.freeLimit: You're at the free-plan limit (3 habits). Pro is coming soon.

emptyState.title: Start your first streak
emptyState.body: Pick one habit. One tap a day. Don't break the chain. Free plan tracks up to three habits.

newHabit.heading: New habit
newHabit.subhead: One habit is plenty to start. You can always add more.

editHabit.heading: Edit habit
editHabit.subhead: Archiving hides a habit from Today but keeps its history. Deleting wipes check-ins too.

habitDetail.totalCheckIns: {count, plural, one {# total check-in} other {# total check-ins}}

heatmap.noHistory: No check-ins yet. Each square fills when you check in.

errors.targetDayRequired: Pick at least one target day.
errors.freeTierLimit: Free plan is limited to {limit} active habits. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited.
